description: Use this API to set multi-section line logical extension data. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.1.0. ierr = set_ext_msline_logical(ibus, jbus, mslid, string, lval)
python_syntax: ierr = set_ext_msline_logical(ibus, jbus, mslid, string, lval)

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: String indicating the extension msline field desired. (input).

error_codes.description: Bad data type for field ‘STRING’; ‘LVAL’ not set.
Unknown error with data access; ‘LVAL’ not set.
API Prereqs not met; ‘LVAL’ not set.
